title: Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
